summary: First end-to-end test for SOS Dépannage France. Backend: 28/28 pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend: critical user/admin flows work (home, theme toggle, language toggle, services catalogue with filtering, shop, cart, login → admin redirect /admin, login → client redirect /account, all admin tabs, account tabs, public pages). One frontend integration issue with the intervention form submit (success toast not detected — likely a missing data-testid for confirmation and missing test-ids on postal_code/city fields).

minor.issue: Cookie takes precedence over Authorization Bearer header. A stale httpOnly cookie can override a freshly-issued Bearer token in the same browser/session. Should consider preferring explicit Bearer header or clearing cookie on every login.
No brute-force lockout (playbook recommends 5-fail lockout). All login attempts return uniformly.
Stats are synthetic offsets (+12847 interventions, +5234 clients) — acceptable for MVP but noted.

ui_bugs.issue: Required fields `code postal` (#postal_code) and `ville` (#city) have NO data-testid (review-request spec listed iv-* but missing these two). Native HTML required validation pops up and blocks submit if not filled. Also form auto-prefills first_name/last_name/email/phone from logged-in user via useEffect which can race with programmatic fills.

Actual testids are `nav-nav_home`, `nav-nav_services`, `nav-nav_shop`, etc. (double prefix because NAV.key already starts with `nav_`). The review-request documented them as `nav-services`, `nav-shop` etc. Either update keys to `home`/`services` or update spec.

Clicking checkout when unauthenticated did not redirect to /login (URL stayed at /cart). If the spec is to redirect or open an inline checkout form, please verify behavior. No visible feedback was given to the user on click.

integration_issues.issue: After filling all fields and clicking iv-submit, no success toast/dialog appeared and URL stayed at /intervention. POST /api/interventions works (backend test passes), so this is likely a missing Sonner/toast on success or missing data-testid like `iv-success`. Recommend adding `data-testid="iv-success"` to the success indicator.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes for `iv-city`, `iv-postal-code` on intervention form inputs (#city and #postal_code)
Add data-testid for intervention success indicator (e.g. iv-success or a toast) so submission can be verified by tests/users
Verify cart checkout-btn behavior when unauthenticated — currently a click on /cart does nothing visible (no redirect to /login, no error). Either redirect to /login or show inline login prompt
(Optional) Rename NAV keys in Header.jsx from `nav_home`/`nav_services` etc to `home`/`services` so testids become `nav-home`/`nav-services` as documented
(Optional/Security) Consider reversing token precedence: prefer Authorization Bearer over cookie to avoid stale-cookie shadowing; also add brute-force lockout (5 fails) on /api/auth/login
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a 824-line single file with all routes, models, seed, helpers — fine for MVP but should be split into routers (auth/services/products/orders/interventions/admin) and a seed.py for maintainability beyond MVP.
Auth: httpOnly cookie precedence over Bearer header may cause hard-to-debug auth issues (stale session > fresh token).
All Mongo queries correctly exclude `_id` via projection {'_id': 0} — good.
@app.on_event is deprecated in modern FastAPI — should migrate to lifespan handler.
Frontend intervention form auto-prefills via useEffect dependent on user — make sure the effect only runs on mount or guard for race with manual edits.
test_credentials: Used as provided: admin@store.com/Admin123!, client1@store.com/Client123! — both work
seed_data_creation: None added beyond what the seed_database() startup creates. Test data uses TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid (100% pass). Focus next testing on: (1) intervention form success indicator after frontend fix, (2) cart checkout flow end-to-end (login → checkout → order created → visible in /account orders tab and /admin orders tab), (3) admin CRUD UI for services/products (create-service-btn, save-service, create-product-btn, save-product), (4) admin order/intervention status patch from UI, (5) admin user toggle/delete from UI. Intervention form has fields #postal_code and #city without data-testid — main agent should add them.
rca_of_intervention_submit_issue: Form has required HTML5 fields city (#city) and postal_code (#postal_code) without data-testid. When tested via Playwright without filling them, browser native validation prevents submit. When filled and submitted, POST /api/interventions returns 200 (proven via backend test) but no visible success toast was rendered on the page. Suggests either toast not implemented or rendered but not query-able. Add data-testid="iv-success" to the success state UI.
